stories.title: Repo bootstrap: extract zip, register in setup.sh
acceptanceCriteria: Directory /Users/andresilvaburgstahler/Ws/Rib/reverso/docs/ exists
Files 01-brd.md, 02-prd.md, 03-architecture.md, 04-mvp.md exist under reverso/docs/
setup.sh LOCAL_DIRS array contains 'reverso'
setup.sh is valid bash and can be sourced without error

stories.title: SDLC init: deepinit generates AGENTS.md for reverso
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/AGENTS.md exists
AGENTS.md references the 4 spec docs in reverso/docs/
AGENTS.md includes routing rules, stack overview (Python+LiteLLM+asyncio), and vault hard rules where applicable
AGENTS.md has valid YAML frontmatter

stories.title: Phase 0 spike: CLI invocation and output format research
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/docs/spike-notes.md exists
spike-notes.md documents how to invoke 'claude' non-interactively with a user prompt
spike-notes.md documents how to invoke 'codex' non-interactively with a user prompt
spike-notes.md documents the output format for plain text responses for both CLIs
spike-notes.md documents tool-use output format (or confirms not parseable) for both CLIs
spike-notes.md confirms per-workspace isolation behavior for both CLIs
spike-notes.md includes a go/no-go decision: v1-full (tool interception) or v1-small (sessions only)

stories.title: Phase 1: Python project skeleton and pyproject.toml
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/pyproject.toml exists with [project] name='reverso', requires-python>=3.11
reverso/reverso/__init__.py exists
reverso/reverso/providers/__init__.py exists
reverso/reverso/daemon/__init__.py exists
reverso/reverso/middleware/__init__.py exists
reverso/config/ directory exists
reverso/tests/ directory exists
reverso/launchd/ directory exists
'pip install -e reverso/' installs without error (in a temp venv)

stories.title: Phase 1: models.yaml with all 8 model entries
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/config/models.yaml exists
Contains at least one Claude model entry (claude-sonnet or claude-opus)
Contains at least one OpenAI/Codex model entry (gpt-5.x or codex variant)
Contains deepseek-reasoner and deepseek-chat entries as HTTP-forwarded (api_base set)
Contains MiniMax model aliases as HTTP-forwarded
Each entry has a provider field identifying whether it is cli-wrapped or http-forwarded
YAML parses without error

stories.title: Phase 1: config.yaml and litellm_config.yaml
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/config/config.yaml exists with bind_host: '127.0.0.1', port: 4000, default_workspace key
reverso/config/litellm_config.yaml exists and references models.yaml for model_list
litellm_config.yaml includes environment_variables section referencing Keychain-sourced secrets
Both YAML files parse without error

stories.title: Phase 1: stateless Anthropic and OpenAI CLI providers
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/reverso/providers/anthropic_cli_provider.py exists
reverso/reverso/providers/openai_cli_provider.py exists
Each provider implements the LiteLLM custom provider interface (completion method)
Each provider spawns the wrapped CLI as a subprocess per-request (stateless, no session reuse)
Each provider captures stdout and returns the final assistant text as a LiteLLM response
Normalization functions ported from ~/.local/bin/codex-litellm-responses-shim: normalize_function_call_arguments, sanitize_input_tool_sequence, compact_input_items, strip_think_blocks
Python files have no syntax errors (python -m py_compile passes)

stories.title: Phase 1: x_gateway middleware envelope
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/reverso/middleware/x_gateway.py exists
Middleware wraps all responses to add x_gateway object with: session_id (null for Phase 1), observations (empty list for Phase 1), workspace (from request x_gateway.workspace or default)
x_gateway.workspace validation: returns HTTP 400 if path does not exist or is not a directory
Python file has no syntax errors

stories.title: Phase 1: launchd plist for LiteLLM process
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/launchd/com.andres.reverso.litellm.plist exists
Plist has RunAtLoad=true and KeepAlive.SuccessfulExit=false
Plist stdout/stderr log to ~/Library/Logs/reverso/litellm.out.log and litellm.err.log
Plist is valid XML (xmllint --noout passes)
README.md or docs/launchd-setup.md documents how to load/unload the agent

stories.title: Phase 1: README and smoke test instructions
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/README.md exists
README describes quick-start: install dependencies, configure Keychain secrets, load launchd agent
README includes a curl smoke test example for POST /v1/chat/completions with a DeepSeek model
README includes a curl smoke test example for POST /v1/messages with a Claude model
README documents that this replaces the existing codex-litellm shim (decommission instructions for existing LaunchAgents)

stories.title: Phase 1: Codex config.toml updated to point at port 4000
acceptanceCriteria: ~/.codex/config.toml contains a [model_providers.reverso_gateway] section with base_url='http://127.0.0.1:4000/v1' and wire_api='responses'
~/.codex/config.toml contains at least one [profiles.reverso_*] section using reverso_gateway
Original minimax_gateway and deepseek_gateway sections are preserved (not removed) until Reverso is verified working (decommission is manual)
TOML syntax is valid

stories.title: Phase 2: Session daemon implementation
acceptanceCriteria: reverso/reverso/daemon/session_daemon.py exists
reverso/reverso/daemon/session_table.py exists
Session daemon exposes a Unix-domain socket HTTP API at ~/Library/Application Support/reverso/daemon.sock
Session table keys sessions by (machine, workspace, provider) tuple
Session daemon spawns new CLI subprocess for unknown session key
Session daemon reuses existing subprocess for known session key (multi-turn test documented in spike-notes or tests)
Session daemon implements idle detection: subprocess recycled after configured idle timeout
launchd/com.andres.reverso.daemon.plist exists for daemon LaunchAgent
Python files have no syntax errors

stories.title: Phase 2: Session integration in CLI providers
acceptanceCriteria: anthropic_cli_provider.py and openai_cli_provider.py updated to call session daemon instead of spawning per-request
Providers pass (machine, workspace, provider) session key to daemon via UDS
x_gateway.session_id is populated in responses (non-null)
httpx with HTTPTransport(uds=...) used for daemon communication
Python files have no syntax errors

stories.title: Phase 3: Tool interception and x_gateway observations
acceptanceCriteria: Tool-use output from wrapped CLIs is parsed into structured Observation objects
Each Observation has: type (file_edit/shell_cmd/read), timestamp, detail fields
x_gateway.observations list is populated with observations from the current turn
Structured JSON logs capture observations per session in ~/Library/Logs/reverso/
If spike-notes.md concluded tool parsing is not feasible, this story is documented as v1-small with rationale and marked passes: true with that documented rationale
